arts.ttl: Jamie O'Hara slams Tottenham after Arsenal defeat as he blames signing players from smaller clubs for poor performances
arts.sum: Jamie O'Hara was scathing in his assessment of Tottenham after Sunday's 1-0 defeat to Arsenal.

arts.ttl: Adrien Rabiot's next club confirmed after Arsenal, Man United transfer talk
arts.sum: Marseille confirm that they have an agreement in place to sign former Juventus midfielder Adrien Rabiot as a free agent on a two-year contract.

arts.ttl: Cristian Romero retweets post hitting out at Tottenham for not flying players back from international duty on a private jet after the Spurs defender was at fault for Arsenal's winner in derby
arts.sum: MATT BARLOW: Travel responsibilities for international games lie with the national federations and Spurs were happy for Romero to return on the flights proposed by Argentina

arts.ttl: Paul Merson admits Gabriel's winner for Arsenal at Tottenham should not have stood
arts.sum: Arsenal defender Gabriel Magalhaes scored the only goal of the game to help the Gunners beat Tottenham but the North London derby winner was a controversial one

arts.ttl: Neville: Arsenal played like league winners | 'Perfect prep for City game'
arts.sum: Gary Neville believes Arsenal played with the experience of a Premier League-winning team in their North London derby win at Tottenham - and believes it was the perfect preparation for next weekend's mouth-watering tie at Manchester City.

arts.ttl: Ange Postecoglou appears to promise Spurs fans a trophy this season after Arsenal defeat
arts.sum: Ange Postecoglou's Tottenham side have now lost two of their opening four games, winning just once after spending around £150million on new players this summer

arts.ttl: Tweets of the Week: Deja vu for Everton, Arsenal’s mascot, Bryan’s Gunn
arts.sum: This is your one-stop shop for the best football tweets from the past week. Everton losing 3-2 after going two goals up? I’ve seen this movie before. pic.twitter.com/HbMjeCHu9h — S T (@TheGoodisonGang) September 14, 2024 Their commitment to the bit is impressive. You can only admire Everton’s always say die attitude. arts.ttl: Report: How much Spurs could earn by hosting the Champions League Final
arts.oTtl: The Spurs Web – Tottenham Hotspur Football News
arts.sum: Former Everton and Aston Villa CEO Keith Wyness says that Tottenham Hotspur could earn up to £6m if their stadium hosts the Champions League final.... arts.ttl: Paul Merson Thinks Arsenal Goal vs Tottenham Should Have Been Disallowed
arts.sum: Gabriel bagged the winner for Arsenal in the north London derby, but Merson doesn't think it should have been allowed to stand

arts.ttl: Report: Man United are tracking attacker who is firmly on Tottenham’s radar
arts.oTtl: The Spurs Web – Tottenham Hotspur Football News
arts.sum: Fabrizio Romano reveals that Manchester United are now keeping an eye on rumoured Tottenham target Eberechi Eze with a view to signing the attacking midfielder...
